product.name: Sharp Line Pomade, 3 oz
product.description: Medium hold, matte finish, water based. The same tin we use on the chair.

product.name: Sharp Line Beard Oil, 4 oz
product.description: Light cedar and citrus, no greasy shine. Softens and conditions.

product.name: Aftershave Balm, unscented, 8 oz
product.description: Calms the skin after a straight-razor shave. Fragrance free.

product.name: Engraved-Handle Comb
product.description: Small batch, made in the back room by Ty. Each one is engraved with the shop mark. Limited stock.
product.note: Batch yields vary, price holds at 24.00 unless James approves a change.

fulfillment.note: Online orders reviewed nightly during the holiday push. In-shop pickup preferred for local clients.
